name: DJI Matrice 350 RTK
description: Industry-standard multirotor platform for LiDAR and photogrammetry. Pairs with Zenmuse L2 for centimeter-accurate terrain mapping. 55-minute flight time and IP55 rating make it the workhorse for most commercial survey operations.

name: DJI Zenmuse L2
description: DJI's flagship LiDAR payload. 240,000 points/sec, 450m detection range, and integrated 4/3-inch CMOS camera for true-color point clouds. The standard choice for commercial survey operations on DJI platforms.

name: RIEGL VUX-10025
description: Professional UAV LiDAR scanner with industry-leading 1.3M pts/sec acquisition. 160-degree extra-wide FOV for complex terrain and narrow canyon mapping. Available standalone or as fully integrated UAV system with IMU/GNSS.

name: RIEGL VUX-820-G
description: All-in-one topographic and shallow-water bathymetric LiDAR for drones. Maps land and water in a single flight. Embedded GNSS/IMU eliminates external navigation boxes. Ideal for coastal, riverine, and watershed surveys.

name: Leica RTC360
description: The benchmark terrestrial LiDAR scanner for as-built documentation, BIM, and structural inspection. Under 2-minute full-dome scan time. Onboard HDR imaging for true-color point clouds. Integrates with Leica Cyclone ecosystem.

name: Trimble R12i GNSS
description: Industry-leading RTK rover with ProPoint GNSS engine and IMU-based tilt compensation. Take accurate measurements up to 60° of tilt — no need to level the rod. The benchmark for precision land surveying.

name: Emlid Reach RS3
description: Affordable RTK GNSS rover with professional specifications. Multi-frequency, multi-constellation. Connects to NTRIP correction networks via cellular. The go-to entry point for budget-conscious survey operations and drone GCP work.

name: DJI Zenmuse P1
description: 45MP full-frame photogrammetry payload for DJI enterprise drones. Mechanical global shutter eliminates rolling shutter distortion. 3-axis stabilization ensures sharp images at higher speeds. The standard for drone photogrammetry deliverables.

name: Emesent GX1
description: All-in-one SLAM LiDAR, RTK positioning, and 360° imagery in a single integrated unit. Maps GPS-denied environments including tunnels, mines, underground utilities, and dense urban canyons. Launched at Geo Week 2026.

name: Leica TS16 Total Station
description: The benchmark robotic total station for boundary, control, and construction surveys. Automatic Target Recognition locks onto prism without manual aiming. 1-arc-second angular accuracy. Integrates with Leica Captivate field software.

name: Faro Focus Premium
description: Long-range terrestrial scanner popular for construction, architecture, and as-built documentation. 350m range, 165MP onboard imaging. Compact, lightweight design. Widely used for BIM deliverables and factory/industrial scanning.

name: Trimble MX9 Mobile Mapping
description: Modular mobile mapping system for road condition surveys, corridor mapping, and urban 3D. Four LiDAR scanners ensure full 360° coverage at highway speeds. Mounts on any vehicle with a standard roof rack.

name: Getac ZX10 Field Tablet
description: Military-spec rugged tablet built for field survey work. Sunlight-readable display works in direct sun. IP67 waterproof — survives submersion. Runs full Windows for Trimble Access, Leica Captivate, and field GIS applications.

name: Topcon GT-1003 Total Station
description: High-accuracy robotic total station with 0.5-arc-second precision and 6km prism range. Sub-second measurement speed for efficient stakeout and control work. Auto-tracking prism for one-person operation.

name: IDS GeoRadar MyMO Monitor
description: Portable non-contact structural monitoring device using radar interferometry. Detects millimeter-level displacement in bridges, retaining walls, and unstable slopes — without attaching targets to the structure. Released February 2026.
